title: settings
subtitle: configure app preferences
currencySubtitle: display amounts in your preferred currency using live exchange rates
projectionsSubtitle: choose pay periods, starting date, and opening free cash balance for projections
addScheduleFirstPrefix: > add an income pay schedule on
projectionStartDateHint: > projections begin on this date; only the opening balance applies until the next pay date (no income in that window)
initialFreeMoneyHint: > free cash balance on the projection start date
extraSpentSubtitle: optimal limit for unplanned spending (expenses not tied to recurring, planned, or budgets)
extraSpentHint: > leave empty to remove the limit
